summary: BG Mode Sweep completed for i18n PATCH. All 8 updated pages (AdvancesPage, PayrollRunsPage, PayrollDetailPage, ModuleTogglesPage, CompanySettingsPage, AuditLogPage, ActivityCatalogPage, SiteAttendancePage) have been verified - ZERO English UI strings found. All labels, buttons, headers, table columns, status badges, filter options, and dialog content are correctly translated to Bulgarian. Language switcher works correctly.

Both translation files (bg.json, en.json) contain all required keys

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI strings on tested pages are correctly translated to Bulgarian

context_for_next_testing_agent: BG Mode Sweep for i18n PATCH completed successfully. All 8 pages (AdvancesPage, PayrollRunsPage, PayrollDetailPage, ModuleTogglesPage, CompanySettingsPage, AuditLogPage, ActivityCatalogPage, SiteAttendancePage) verified - ZERO English UI strings found. The specific issues mentioned in the request ('All Active Projects' and 'Marked At' columns on SiteAttendancePage) have been fixed and now show 'Всички активни проекти' and 'ОТБЕЛЯЗАНО В' respectively. Module names/descriptions from backend database are expected to remain in English as per requirements.
